Documentation for this format

name: EHDSImmunisationObligations
title: Immunisation obligations
description: Obligations for the logical model for immunisation.

element.short: Immunisation model
element.definition: Model describes the administration of immunisation products, including vaccines and immunoglobulins, covering active and passive immunisations. It focuses on immunisation as a clinical procedure rather than the resulting immunity. The model supports routine immunisations at standard doses and may overlap with medication summaries or prescription lists. Natural immunity, immunisation outcomes, refusals, and administration or planning details are out of scope.

element.short: Basic metadata for this information
element.definition: Basic metadata for this information

element.short: Patient/subject information
element.definition: Patient/subject information

element.short: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).
element.definition: Business identifier for the object, unique within its system. Supporting disambiguation between different contexts (systems/countries).

element.short: The author of the immunisation statement.
element.definition: The author of the immunisation statement.

element.short: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing
element.definition: Date and optionally time of authoring/issuing

element.short: Status of the immunisation event (completed, not-done).
element.definition: Status of the immunisation event (completed, not-done).

element.short: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.
element.definition: Source of information (e.g. patient, patient's proxy). Used in case the patient has authored the information or the author has submitted patient-stated information.

element.short: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.
element.definition: Language in which the resource is written. Language is expressed by the IETF language tag.

element.short: Disease or agent that the vaccination provides protection against (e.g. 76902006 Tetanus).
element.definition: Disease or agent that the vaccination provides protection against (e.g. 76902006 Tetanus).

element.short: Type of immunisation, e.g. J07AM01 Tetanus toxoid; or 871803007 Hepatitis A and Hepatitis B virus antigens only vaccine product.
element.definition: Type of immunisation, e.g. J07AM01 Tetanus toxoid; or 871803007 Hepatitis A and Hepatitis B virus antigens only vaccine product.

element.short: Administered medicinal product (e.g. TETAVAX suspension for injection), including batch/lot details when necessary.
element.definition: Administered medicinal product (e.g. TETAVAX suspension for injection), including batch/lot details when necessary.

element.short: An identifier (e.g. from EMA SPOR PMS or national registry) or a code (e.g. from SNOMED CT or national code system) for the product (virtual product, branded product, or package). If several identifiers are specified, they shall not have conflicting meanings or very different granularities. An identifier might not exist e.g. for substance-based prescriptions.
element.definition: An identifier (e.g. from EMA SPOR PMS or national registry) or a code (e.g. from SNOMED CT or national code system) for the product (virtual product, branded product, or package). If several identifiers are specified, they shall not have conflicting meanings or very different granularities. An identifier might not exist e.g. for substance-based prescriptions.

element.short: Classification (e.g. ATC; narcotic/psychotropic; orphan drug; etc.)
element.definition: Classification (e.g. ATC; narcotic/psychotropic; orphan drug; etc.)

element.short: Current trade name (authorised name) of the product. When medication is specified by a CodeableConcept, the name may be omitted when available as the display name of the concept.
element.definition: Current trade name (authorised name) of the product. When medication is specified by a CodeableConcept, the name may be omitted when available as the display name of the concept.

element.short: Marketing authorisation holder of the medicinal product. Relevant for identifying the exact product. If the product does not have a marketing authorisation, the manufacturer information may be used.
element.definition: Marketing authorisation holder of the medicinal product. Relevant for identifying the exact product. If the product does not have a marketing authorisation, the manufacturer information may be used.

element.short: Name of the organisation holding the authorisation for marketing/manufacturing
element.definition: Name of the organisation holding the authorisation for marketing/manufacturing

element.short: Identifier of the organisation and/or its physical location
element.definition: Identifier of the organisation and/or its physical location

element.short: Dose form at the package level (e.g. authorised dose form), corresponding to IDMP Combined Pharmaceutical Dose Form (this includes terms from EDQM Combination Pack or Combined Dose Form lists). Dose form for a single package item is defined in item.doseForm.
element.definition: Dose form at the package level (e.g. authorised dose form), corresponding to IDMP Combined Pharmaceutical Dose Form (this includes terms from EDQM Combination Pack or Combined Dose Form lists). Dose form for a single package item is defined in item.doseForm.

element.short: Textual description of the product, e.g. including package description.
element.definition: Textual description of the product, e.g. including package description.

element.short: A medication item. For combination packs, this can be multiple manufactured items with each item having its own dose form and ingredients+strengths defined
element.definition: A medication item. For combination packs, this can be multiple manufactured items with each item having its own dose form and ingredients+strengths defined

element.short: Administrable or manufactured item dose form, depending on the type of medication definition. This should not include combined dose forms.
element.definition: Administrable or manufactured item dose form, depending on the type of medication definition. This should not include combined dose forms.

element.short: Ingredients
element.definition: Ingredients

element.short: Marks whether the ingredient is considered an active ingredient. Excipients are typically not needed, and by default only active ingredients are expected.
element.definition: Marks whether the ingredient is considered an active ingredient. Excipients are typically not needed, and by default only active ingredients are expected.

element.short: Substance
element.definition: Substance

element.short: Strength of the product - amount of substance per unit
element.definition: Strength of the product - amount of substance per unit

element.short: Concentration or presentation strength, e.g '100 mg/1 ml' or '500 mg per 1 tablet'
element.definition: Concentration or presentation strength, e.g '100 mg/1 ml' or '500 mg per 1 tablet'

element.short: Substance that the strength refers to, especially when different from .item.strength.substance
element.definition: Substance that the strength refers to, especially when different from .item.strength.substance

element.short: Unit of presentation for the manufactured item (tablet, vial, tube). Typically, the smallest countable object in the package.
element.definition: Unit of presentation for the manufactured item (tablet, vial, tube). Typically, the smallest countable object in the package.

element.short: Manufactured item quantity per one item (3 ml / 1 vial)
element.definition: Manufactured item quantity per one item (3 ml / 1 vial)

element.short: Number of such items in this product (5 vials). The combined amount of all items will be considered to be the total package size.
element.definition: Number of such items in this product (5 vials). The combined amount of all items will be considered to be the total package size.

binding.description: UCUM for units of measure. EDQM Standard Terms for units of presentation.

element.short: Type of package of the medication item
element.definition: Type of package of the medication item

element.short: Administration device included in the product. Devices that are not inside the medication package are excluded.
element.definition: Administration device included in the product. Devices that are not inside the medication package are excluded.

element.short: Number of such devices
element.definition: Number of such devices

element.short: Device coded
element.definition: Device coded

element.short: Additional features of the product (e.g. reimbursable, sugar-free, easy-open cap, score-lined). It is expected that implementers will define a valueset supporting their use cases.
element.definition: Additional features of the product (e.g. reimbursable, sugar-free, easy-open cap, score-lined). It is expected that implementers will define a valueset supporting their use cases.

element.short: A code expressing the type of characteristic.
element.definition: A code expressing the type of characteristic.

element.short: Description of the characteristic value.
element.definition: Description of the characteristic value.

element.short: Batch information of a medicinal product. Typically recorded during dispense or administration, rarely known or relevant for a prescription/request.
element.definition: Batch information of a medicinal product. Typically recorded during dispense or administration, rarely known or relevant for a prescription/request.

element.short: Batch identifier of the medicinal product.
element.definition: Batch identifier of the medicinal product.

element.short: Batch expiration date of the medicinal product.
element.definition: Batch expiration date of the medicinal product.

element.short: The date and optionally the exact time when the vaccination was administered.
element.definition: The date and optionally the exact time when the vaccination was administered.

element.short: Administering centre or a health authority responsible for the vaccination event
element.definition: Administering centre or a health authority responsible for the vaccination event

element.short: Health professional responsible for administering the immunisation product.
element.definition: Health professional responsible for administering the immunisation product.

element.short: Any additional free-text information about the immunisation
element.definition: Any additional free-text information about the immunisation
